urn:contentItem:6JHD-SVN3-S56J-J23H-00000-00ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - INDUSTRY SPOTLIGHT: KEY TRENDS AND PEER HIGHLIGHTS2026-05-06T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisSTOCKECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - INDUSTRY SPOTLIGHT: KEY TRENDS AND PEER HIGHLIGHTS

DASHBOARD: ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.

PermID4296560718Websitehttp://www.ecotricity.co.ukIndustryEnergy & Renewables

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JH5-GWJ3-RVKP-T3CY-00000-00ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - CURRENT INDUSTRY DEVELOPMENTS WITH PEERS2026-05-05T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisSTOCKECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - CURRENT INDUSTRY DEVELOPMENTS WITH PEERS

DASHBOARD: ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.

PermID4296560718Websitehttp://www.ecotricity.co.ukIndustryEnergy & Renewables

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JH0-VC63-RX36-R30J-00000-00ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - PEER INSIGHTS: INDUSTRY HIGHLIGHTS & KEY TRENDS2026-05-04T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisSTOCKECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - PEER INSIGHTS: INDUSTRY HIGHLIGHTS & KEY TRENDS

DASHBOARD: ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.

PermID4296560718Websitehttp://www.ecotricity.co.ukIndustryEnergy & Renewables

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

urn:contentItem:6JH3-PB23-RY1D-D20W-00000-00ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - INDUSTRY UPDATES AND PEER TRENDS2026-05-04T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisSTOCKECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - INDUSTRY UPDATES AND PEER TRENDS

DASHBOARD: ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.

PermID4296560718Websitehttp://www.ecotricity.co.ukIndustryEnergy & Renewables

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

urn:contentItem:6JGJ-X4R3-RT7Y-9053-00000-00ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - INDUSTRY PULSE: KEY TRENDS AND PEER INSIGHTS2026-05-02T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisSTOCKECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - INDUSTRY PULSE: KEY TRENDS AND PEER INSIGHTS

DASHBOARD: ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.

PermID4296560718Websitehttp://www.ecotricity.co.ukIndustryEnergy & Renewables

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

urn:contentItem:6JGN-S093-S3VB-54GP-00000-00ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - INDUSTRY UPDATES AND PEER TRENDS2026-05-02T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisSTOCKECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. - INDUSTRY UPDATES AND PEER TRENDS

DASHBOARD: ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.

PermID4296560718Websitehttp://www.ecotricity.co.ukIndustryEnergy & Renewables

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

value.Title: May 07, 2026: Orrick Adds Employment Leader to California Tech Team in Sacramento

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JK7-7K23-S048-H1RB-00000-00May 07, 2026: Orrick Adds Employment Leader to California Tech Team in Sacramento2026-05-14T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisANNOUNCEMENTSMay 07, 2026: Orrick Adds Employment Leader to California Tech Team in Sacramento

Orrick has appointed Sarah Tauman as a partner in its California Employment practice, based in Sacramento, effective 12th May 2026. She will advise venture-backed technology companies on employment matters as they scale their operations and expand their businesses. Tauman brings experience across health tech, fintech and consumer tech, including guidance on employment considerations in mergers and acquisitions and initial public offerings. Her appointment fits into Orrick's broader strategy to expand its Tech Companies platform in 2026 and follows recent hires of Agatha Kluk in New York and Gina Marek in Silicon Valley. The California Employment practice is recognized as Band 1 by Chambers, reflecting its deep industry knowledge. Julie Totten, Leader of Global Employment Law and Litigation Practice, said the demand for employment counseling spans all growth stages, and Tauman added, 'Orrick is known for leadership in Tech and Employment, and particularly for innovation. I’m excited to be joining such a highly regarded team, and I look forward to collaborating to serve our clients.'

INDEX

SECTION 1 ORRICK, HERRINGTON & SUTCLIFFE LLP PROFILE

SECTION 1 ORRICK, HERRINGTON & SUTCLIFFE LLP PROFILE

1.1 ACTIVITIES

Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP, founded in 1863, is a global law firm headquartered in San Francisco, California. With over 1,100 lawyers across 25 offices, it serves technology, life sciences, and energy clients, specializing in M&A, IP, and venture capital. In 2024, it advised Coatue Management on $11.35 billion in investments, earning recognition as a top firm for startups and SaaS companies. Its culture fosters collaboration, diversity, and innovation, with key lawyers like Mark Solakian driving tech deals. Competing with Cooley, Orrick stands out for its tech-sector expertise and client-side advice. Recent initiatives include expanding AI and cybersecurity practices.

Mission

Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP (Orrick) stands as a global leader in the legal industry, renowned for innovation, collaboration, and inclusivity. With over 25 worldwide offices and expertise spanning Technology & Innovation, Energy & Infrastructure, Finance, and Life Sciences & HealthTech, Orrick provides forward-thinking legal services tailored to client needs. Recognized for excellence in venture capital, renewable energy transactions, and high-stakes litigation, the firm prides itself on its commitment to diversity and cutting-edge solutions.

Vision

Orrick envisions establishing itself as a trusted global partner, offering innovative legal solutions that empower clients to grow, innovate, and succeed in rapidly evolving industries. Their goal is to redefine legal services by blending expertise with creativity to deliver comprehensive advice.

Values

Orrick's foundation is built upon the following core values:

Excellence: Upholding the highest standards of professionalism and quality in every service.

Teamwork: Encouraging collaboration within and beyond the firm to achieve outstanding outcomes.

Innovation: Committed to redefining legal practices through creative, client-centric approaches.

Perseverance: Tenaciously working to deliver the best possible outcomes for clients.

Inclusivity: Fostering a diverse and equitable environment where everyone is empowered to thrive.

By combining these principles, Orrick continues to elevate its reputation as a frontrunner in the global legal landscape.

urn:contentItem:6JK3-R9X3-RS4X-J22D-00000-00China's Top 3 Electrical Steel Traders in 2026: Leading Global Energy Transition & High-Performance Material Innovation2026-05-14T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisPRESS RELEASESChina's Top 3 Electrical Steel Traders in 2026: Leading Global Energy Transition & High-Performance Material InnovationStaff Writer

Unlocking Next-Gen Power Efficiency with China's Leading Electrical Steel Traders

CALIFORNIA, CA, UNITED STATES, May 14, 2026 /EINPresswire.com/ -- Shantou, Guangdong, 2026 As the world accelerates toward carbon neutrality and electrification, electrical steel (also known as silicon steel) has become a cornerstone material for energy-efficient transformers, motors, generators, and new energy vehicles. Chinese electrical steel traders have emerged as key suppliers in the global market, offering competitive pricing, reliable quality, and strong supply chain integration. This article profiles three leading electrical steel traders in China that are shaping the industry in 2026, with a special focus on HL AND SL LIMITED, a company that has consistently ranked among the top three in export volume.

The Rising Role of Chinese Electrical Steel Traders

Global demand for electrical steel is surging due to grid modernization, renewable energy integration, and electric vehicle proliferation. According to industry data, China accounts for more than 50% of the world's electrical steel production. Among the numerous trading companies, a handful have distinguished themselves through deep mill relationships, precision processing capabilities, and a broad export footprint. The following three companies represent the top echelon of China's electrical steel trade sector in 2026.

1. HL AND SL LIMITED Baowu Silicon Steel– The Integrated Service Leader

Company Profile & Scale

Founded in 2012, HL AND SL LIMITED (www.hlslind.com) specializes in the export trade of electrical steel (silicon steel). The company is an authorized agent of China Baowu Steel Group, one of the world's largest steel producers. With an annual production capacity of 30,000 tons and a manufacturing facility covering 30,000 square meters, it employs approximately 50 staff members and maintains an R&D team of 10 engineers. Export business accounts for 80% of total sales, with key markets including Mexico, Brazil, Italy, the United Arab Emirates, and India.

In-House Processing and Supply Chain Strength

Unlike many pure trading companies, HL AND SL LIMITED owns a fully equipped material processing plant. This enables precise secondary processing services such as strip cutting, fixed-length flat cutting, and longitudinal cutting, ensuring materials arrive "customized on demand and ready to use." The company integrates export resources from multiple private steel mills, allowing flexible matching of products across different performance grades and price pointsfrom high-end grain-oriented Hi-B steels to economical non-oriented grades.

Product Portfolio & Technical Excellence

The company offers a comprehensive range of grain-oriented silicon steel models, including the high magnetic induction Hi-B series. Representative models include:

23Q080 – thickness 0.23 mm, iron loss ≤0.80 W/kg (measured 0.76–0.78 W/kg), magnetic flux density ≥1.89 T, suitable for energy-efficient transformers, reactors, and high-power frequency converters.

23Q090 – thickness 0.23 mm, iron loss ≤0.90 W/kg, magnetic flux density ≥1.88 T, designed for industrial small and medium-sized transformers.

23Q095 – thickness 0.23 mm, iron loss ≤0.95 W/kg, magnetic flux density ≥1.88 T, ideal for high-efficiency transformers and motor cores.

20R070 – thickness 0.20 mm, iron loss ≤0.70 W/kg, magnetic flux density ≥1.86 T, used in high-efficiency distribution transformers and power transformer cores.

18-65 (18Q065) – thickness 0.18 mm, iron loss ≤0.65 W/kg, magnetic flux density ≥1.88 T, for ultra-high voltage and high-efficiency energy-saving transformer cores.

Global Project Experience

HL AND SL LIMITED's products have been deployed in demanding applications worldwide. For instance, the Belém Mountain ±800 kV UHVDC project Phase II in Brazil required oriented silicon steel with high magnetic flux density ≥1.92 T and iron loss <0.85 W/kg, operating under high temperature (30–40°C) and high humidity (80–90%). For distribution transformer upgrades in Germany, steel meeting iron loss ≤0.60 W/kg and noise levels 2–3 dB lower than standard was supplied. Additionally, the company has served WEG in Brazil, providing large-scale power and distribution transformer cores that meet local INMETRO energy efficiency standards.

Market Position and Service

HL AND SL LIMITED has consistently ranked among the top three in China's annual electrical steel exports. The company's service philosophy emphasizes "comprehensive material selection, competitive pricing, and rapid response." Standard order lead time is 15–20 days, with urgent orders shipped in 3–7 days. Quality control includes origin inspection, material certificates, and third-party testing (CMA/CNAS). After-sales technical support is provided throughout the product lifecycle, with a 1–3 working day response time for complaint handling.

Contact HL AND SL LIMITED:

Email: sales-01@hlslind.com

Phone/WhatsApp: +86 134-6700-2282

Website: www.hlslind.com

Address: Shantou Qingyuncheng, Jiankang South Street, Jinyuan District, Taiyuan City, Shanxi Province, China

2. Wangbian Electric – The Volume Producer with Integrated Supply Chain

Wangbian Electric is a well-known Chinese electrical steel trader with strong ties to domestic steel mills. The company focuses on leveraging the advantages of an integrated industrial chain. While its output is high, the proportion of high-grade products (e.g., 23Q080 and above) is relatively lower compared to HL AND SL LIMITED. Wangbian Electric's 85–95 grade materials can meet second-level energy efficiency standards, while HL AND SL LIMITED's high-end products have been designed for first-level energy efficiency. Wangbian Electric is best suited for applications such as power distribution transformers, industrial motors, and general distribution networks, especially for customers who prioritize integrated chain cost savings over ultra-low losses. The company's integrated chain advantage allows it to reduce overall costs, and its stable material performance reduces transformer failure rates.

3. POSCO (South Korea) – The Global Premium Brand

POSCO is a globally recognized steelmaker headquartered in South Korea, renowned for its "POSCO Oriented Silicon Steel" brand. POSCO adopts the low-temperature slab heating process, and its high magnetic flux series (PH/PHD) deliver excellent performance. However, compared to HL AND SL LIMITED, POSCO's R&D system is older, while the Chinese trader operates the most advanced equipment globally. In terms of performance, HL AND SL LIMITED's iron loss is 5–8% lower than POSCO's equivalent grades, supply capacity is over 30% higher, and overall procurement cost is 10–15% lower. POSCO is suitable for a variety of efficient power transformers including nuclear power plants, whereas HL AND SL LIMITED offers more comprehensive coverage and strong international alternatives. Due to tariffs and shipping costs, POSCO's offering price is higher than that of HL AND SL LIMITED. In maintenance, POSCO's manufacturing-oriented steel technology is internationally leading with stable products; but HL AND SL LIMITED's technology is advanced though needing continuous brand premium reduction. For efficiency, the POSCO PH/PHD series features high magnetic induction, low iron loss and low noise, on par with HL AND SL LIMITED's P/R series technology globally.

Why Electrical Steel Matters for the Energy Transition

Electrical steel is the core material for transformers, motors, generators, and EVs. Low-loss electrical steel reduces energy waste during power transmission and conversion, directly contributing to lower CO₂ emissions. High-permeability grades enable more compact and efficient designs, while high-frequency grades support inverter-driven systems in electric vehicles and renewable energy plants. As global energy efficiency regulations tighten (e.g., EU Ecodesign, China's energy-efficiency standards for transformers), demand for premium electrical steel grades such as 23Q080, 20R070, and 18Q065 is expected to grow substantially. Traders like HL AND SL LIMITED, with their strong processing capabilities, diverse product mix, and responsive logistics, are well-positioned to support this transition.

Conclusion: Choosing the Right Partner

The selection of an electrical steel supplier is critical for manufacturers of transformers, motors, and other electromagnetic equipment. HL AND SL LIMITED distinguishes itself through its integrated service modelcombining Baowu agency resources, in-house precision processing, comprehensive grade availability (from economical to ultra-premium), and proven track record in demanding global projects (HVDC, cold-region transformers). For buyers seeking a reliable partner that can deliver both high performance and cost efficiency, HL AND SL LIMITED represents a compelling choice among China's top three electrical steel traders.

value.Title: May 01, 2026: Farella Announces 2026 LCLD Pathfinders

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JK2-RP43-RXTC-13WX-00000-00May 01, 2026: Farella Announces 2026 LCLD Pathfinders2026-05-14T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:44ZLexisNexisANNOUNCEMENTSMay 01, 2026: Farella Announces 2026 LCLD Pathfinders

Farella Braun + Martel is proud to announce that senior associates Gabi Hasson and Kevin Jones have been named 2026 LCLD Pathfinders. Designed for high-potential, early-career attorneys, the Pathfinder Program offers a year-long curriculum that helps participants develop leadership skills, build professional relationships and networks, and advance their careers.

Gabi represents companies on a broad range of corporate and transactional matters, including structuring, governance, and commercial agreements, and supports clients through strategic transactions, including mergers and acquisitions and financings. Additionally, Gabi assists renewable energy clients in buying and selling projects at all stages of development, from initial site control through commercial operation. She has worked on several utility-scale solar project sales in the Western United States, on the acquisition of green hydrogen projects, and on structuring and drafting development services agreements and framework agreements for renewable energy clients and their partners. Gabi earned her J.D. from the University of California, Berkeley, School of Law (2020).

Kevin is a management-side employment litigator and counselor and advises a broad range of companies, from family business ventures to Fortune 500 corporations. His practice includes defending employers in single-plaintiff and class-action lawsuits, including trials. He has successfully briefed and argued multiple dispositive motions. Kevin serves as the American Bar Association Labor & Employment Section's liaison to the ABA Commission on Sexual Orientation and Gender Identity, as co-chair of the Employee Rights & Responsibilities State Law Development Committee, and as vice chair of the Outreach to New and Young Lawyers Committee. He earned his J.D. from the University of California, Berkeley, School of Law (2018).

Created by www.buysellsignals.com for News Bites Finance

value.Title: Wall Street Veteran Sabrina H. Phillips Launches Blue Capay Ventures, a Global Investment Banking and Strategic Advisory Firm

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JK3-9173-S2BR-00FV-00000-00Wall Street Veteran Sabrina H. Phillips Launches Blue Capay Ventures, a Global Investment Banking and Strategic Advisory Firm2026-05-14T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisWall Street Veteran Sabrina H. Phillips Launches Blue Capay Ventures, a Global Investment Banking and Strategic Advisory FirmSAN FRANCISCO, May 14, 2026

PR NewswireSAN FRANCISCO, May 14, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Wall Street veteran Sabrina H. Phillips, Founder and CEO, today announced the formal launch of Blue Capay Ventures ("BCV"), a San Francisco-based investment banking and strategic advisory firm and member FINRA/SIPC.

Blue Capay Ventures advises emerging fund managers and early-stage companies in sectors including AI, Infrastructure, Clean Energy, and other Technology-driven markets. The firm supports capital formation, strategic partnerships and capital introduction efforts, including select cross-border initiatives in key geographic regions. The firm cultivates sustainably high-impact partnerships that connect clients with sophisticated and qualified purchasers (QPs) in the U.S. and select international markets across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia. BCV also facilitates curated co-investment opportunities for family offices and strategic institutional investors considering high-impact private-market opportunities in innovation-focused sectors spearheading growth.Founded on the belief that breakthrough companies are often overlooked in their earliest stages, Blue Capay Ventures is designed to help ambitious founders and emerging managers access the strategic relationships, capital networks and global partnerships needed to scale transformative ideas. Ms. Phillips is a former Morgan Stanley executive with more than 20 years of experience across Wall Street and global capital markets. Prior to founding Blue Capay Ventures, Phillips held roles in private equity and venture capital, including investor outreach for Silicon Valley's Foothill Ventures, where she supported investor outreach on behalf of an emerging fund manager with $150 million in AUM. Earlier in her career, she worked in investment banking at Merrill Lynch, institutional equities at Salomon Brothers and with RNK Capital, a $200 million renewable energy fund.A graduate of Harvard University, Phillips resides outside San Francisco with her family."Blue Capay is built for believers,"said Sabrina H. Phillips, Founder and CEO of Blue Capay Ventures."I've seen firsthand how difficult it can be for emerging fund managers and visionary founders to access the right capital networks and strategic partnerships — particularly when they are building bold ideas ahead of where the market is today.""We created Blue Capay Ventures to bridge that gap: connecting global capital with transformative innovation, creating meaningful co-investment opportunities and helping the next generation of founders and fund managers scale with conviction. Backing visionary ideas before they become mainstream and taking a stand when others are still waiting — is the spirit of this company."Phillips states.Blue Capay Ventures is opening its headquarters on Market Street in San Francisco, placing the firm at the center of global innovation, venture capital and emerging technology leadership. The expansion reinforces the company's commitment to building international partnerships and delivering agile cross-border investment and advisory solutions.Blue Capay Ventures focuses on investment banking and capital introduction services for innovation-led companies and emerging managers with pioneering ambitions — core principles that define the firm's differentiated approach and growing international footprint.For more information contact: .Office Address
575 Market Street, Suite 425
San Francisco, CA 94105
Phone: 415-917-8901Media Inquiries
Merideth Gilmor | MGC | | 917-860-5792Founded in 2024, Blue Capay Ventures is a global investment banking and strategic advisory firm led by CEO Sabrina H. Phillips, a Wall Street veteran with more than 20 years of experience in investment banking and global capital markets. Headquartered in San Francisco, the firm connects capital, innovation, and strategic partnerships across key international markets.Blue Capay Ventures is a registered broker-dealer and member FINRA/SIPC. Securities transactions are conducted through Blue Capay Ventures. This communication is for informational purposes only and does not constitute an offer to sell or a solicitation of an offer to buy any security. Securities offerings will only be made pursuant to applicable offering documents and in compliance with applicable local laws. AMERICAN RESULTS

5E Advanced Materials (NASDAQ:FEAM) announced loss for the quarter-ended 31 March 2026 [Q3/2026] of $12.1m, a deterioration from $10.9m in the previous quarter [Q2/2025].

Major changes compared with previous corresponding period [Mar 31, 2026 vs Mar 31, 2025]:

Note:

- EPS of -35.0c

Quarterly Report (Quarter ending 31 Mar 2026)

ACTIVITIES:

5E Advanced Materials Inc., traded on the US Nasdaq, is a specialized producer of advanced materials, with a primary focus on the exploration, development, and production of boron and lithium resources from its assets in California. The company's core business centers on supplying high-purity boron for applications in agriculture, glass manufacturing, and emerging technologies like semiconductors, while its lithium operations support the electric vehicle and energy storage sectors. The fastest-growing segments include lithium extraction for battery materials, fueled by the global surge in electric mobility and renewable energy demands, and high-performance boron products for electronics and clean energy solutions. Through efficient mining techniques and strategic partnerships, 5E is enhancing its market position in the critical minerals industry, contributing to sustainable innovation across key global markets.

MARKET POSITION:

5E Advanced Materials Inc (NASDAQ:FEAM), the NASDAQ's 17th largest Chemicals company by market cap, plummeted $2.82 (or 65.1%) in the trailing 12 months to May 12, 2026 to close at $1.51. This means the stock has underperformed 87% of NASDAQ-listed stocks in the same period. Compared with the NASDAQ-100 Index which has risen 44.9% over the same period, this is a relative price change of -110.0%. Average daily volume of 165,223 shares in the trailing year was 11.7 times average daily volume in the previous year.

value.Title: American Securities Completes Sale of CPM to Rosebank Industries

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JJP-4B13-S4C8-V4B3-00000-00American Securities Completes Sale of CPM to Rosebank Industries2026-05-12T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisAmerican Securities Completes Sale of CPM to Rosebank IndustriesNEW YORK, May 12, 2026

PR NewswireNEW YORK, May 12, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- American Securities LLC ("American Securities"), a leading U.S. private equity firm, today announced the completion of the sale of CPM Holdings, Inc. ("CPM"), a global leader in highly engineered process equipment and automation solutions, to Rosebank Industries plc (LON: ROSE) ("Rosebank"), in a transaction valued at approximately $2.1 billion.* Headquartered in Blaine, Minnesota, CPM is an innovative leader in highly engineered processing equipment used in oilseed, animal feed production, renewable energy, plant-based foods and industrial materials.

Since American Securities' investment in 2018, the company has strengthened its leadership position across key end markets while expanding its higher-margin aftermarket and recurring revenue offerings. CPM increased its presence in attractive growth areas, including renewable energy, and invested significantly in talent, technology, and operational capabilities to support long-term growth. The company also continued to drive innovation through initiatives such as Monarc, a proprietary technology designed to help customers produce clean label products more safely and efficiently at scale."We are incredibly proud of what the CPM team accomplished during our partnership," said Michael Sand, Partner at American Securities. "Together, we strengthened the company's operational capabilities, expanded into new markets, and advanced innovative technologies that position CPM for continued long-term growth. We thank Dave Webster and the entire CPM team and wish them continued success with Rosebank."*Excludes potential earn-out payment based on the achievement of certain FY26 performance targets.About American SecuritiesFounded in 1994, American Securities is a leading U.S. private equity firm that invests in North American companies, primarily in the industrial and B2B services sectors. With $23 billion under management, we partner with businesses generating $200 million to $2 billion in annual revenues. We combine deep sector expertise, differentiated insights and proven internal capabilities to serve as transformational partners that drive growth and build enduring value. Our investment philosophy emphasizes capital preservation through disciplined investing and hands-on engagement, paired with repeatable value creation processes and operational excellence. American Securities is based in New York with an office in Shanghai. For more information, please visitwww.american-securities.com.About CPMFounded in 1883, CPM has evolved from its origins as the California Pellet Mill into a diversified industrial business. Headquartered in Blaine, Minnesota, the company has become an innovative leader in the design and manufacture of highly engineered process equipment and automation systems. CPM serves a global customer base, operating through three core segments: Industrial Solutions, Engineered Solutions and Process Solutions primarily serving the animal feed, oilseed processing, renewable energy, food, and other industrial markets. The company operates 35 facilities globally and maintains a commercial presence in more than 100 countries, with approximately 1,700 employees.Press ContactProsek Partners

value.Title: BIG OIL PREDICTED CLIMATE CHANGE IN THE 1970S

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JJX-8CS3-RV5X-Y3WS-00000-00BIG OIL PREDICTED CLIMATE CHANGE IN THE 1970S2026-05-12T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisBIG OIL PREDICTED CLIMATE CHANGE IN THE 1970SStates News ServiceSAN FRANCISCO, CA

The following information was released by the Sierra Club:

friend,

It's 2050... what do you see? I see an affordable future for my twin boys. I see electrical grids powered by clean energy -- solar, wind, water. I see advances in technology that prioritize everyday people, whether we're Black, White, Latino, Asian, or Indigenous, over the profits of a few greedy CEOs.

I see resilient communities that can withstand a changing climate because we passed laws holding Big Oil and Gas accountable for the extreme weather and climate damages they caused.

But that's not our reality right now. Your electricity bill is 31% higher than it was five years ago, according to the Climate and Community Institute. Your food is more expensive. Your insurance is going up. These are the real costs of climate change, and YOU are paying them while fossil fuel corporations get richer .1

Now, Big Oil and Gas, along with the politicians in their pocket, are scheming up a new way to rig the system in their favor. Senator Ted Cruz (TX) and Rep. Harriett Hageman (WY) introduced a bill as part of an escalating campaign to block efforts to hold the industry accountable, granting them total legal immunity from being held responsible for the floods, fires, and droughts that their products have caused.

We can't let this happen. Tell Congress to hold oil and gas corporations accountable.

Fossil fuel companies knew in the 1970s that burning oil and gas would create enough carbon pollution to cause extreme weather like this. They predicted with surprising accuracy the impacts we're feeling now.

While they continue to rake in billions of dollars in profits, we're left to clean up the mess and pay the price. We need to hold polluters accountable -- it's just fair.

Here's another way to think about it: Imagine Big Oil and Gas is your neighbor. They knew when you'd be gone and plotted to set your house on fire. It burned down. Now they've made a deal with the police to avoid any responsibility. To top it off, they've told the courts you're not even allowed to sue them. You'd call that ridiculous and corrupt!

Well, that's total legal immunity for you.

They are cheating the system, and it's making it more expensive for you and your loved ones to get by.

But here's what they don't want you to know. Even under the Trump administration, Canary Media reported that renewable energy made up 92% of all new U.S. power plant construction in 2025.2 The clean energy future is already here. Big Oil wants immunity before it's too late for them.

More climate disasters mean greater economic instability. A fossil-fuel-dependent future blocks the clean, affordable solutions like solar and wind that are already winning.

We must stop them from getting immunity from Congress, and that starts with you.

Sign this petition to your member of Congress and demand they protect your freedom to a safe, resilient, and affordable future.

Powerful Together,

Roddy Hughes (he/him)

Campaign Organizing Strategist

Sierra Club

P.S. We're working to hold Big Oil and Gas accountable for the climate chaos they're creating, but we need your help! RSVP here to join our livestream TONIGHT on how we can defend our clean energy future or to receive the recording to watch later.

[1] https://stopgreedbuildgreen.climateandcommunity.org/posts/trade-offs

[2] https://www.canarymedia.com/articles/clean-energy/us-new-wind-solar-batteries-2025-trump

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JJD-VWS3-RWF8-6168-00000-00Greencarnewsbreaks - Bollinger Innovations, Inc. (NASDAQ: BINI) Cuts Quarterly Cash Burn By 58% While Advancing EV Sales2026-05-11T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisGreencarnewsbreaks - Bollinger Innovations, Inc. (NASDAQ: BINI) Cuts Quarterly Cash Burn By 58% While Advancing EV Sales

Bollinger Innovations (NASDAQ: BINI), an electric vehicle manufacturer, announced it has reduced its quarterly cash burn from $21.2 million to $8.9 million, a 58% decrease. The Company said cost-cutting measures have been implemented without affecting marketing, sales, or manufacturing capabilities as EV sales momentum grows across commercial vehicle Classes 1, 3 and 4. Its lineup includes the Class 1 urban delivery EV cargo van, the Class 3 urban utility EV cab chassis truck, and the Bollinger B4 Chassis Cab, an all-electric Class 4 commercial truck designed with extensive fleet and upfitter input. All vehicles are available for sale in the U.S. and comply with Federal Motor Vehicle Safety Standards, EPA regulations, and CARB certifications.To view the full press release, visit
About Bollinger Innovations, Inc.


Bollinger Innovations (NASDAQ: BINI) is a SouthernCalifornia-based automotive company building the next generation of commercial electric vehicles (“EVs”) with a U.S. based vehicle manufacturing facility located in Tunica, Mississippi. Both the ONE, a Class 1 EV cargo van, and THREE, a Class 3 EV cab chassis truck, are available for sale in the U.S. The Company's commercial dealer network consists of six dealers, which includes Papé Kenworth, Pritchard EV, National Auto Fleet Group, Ziegler Truck Group, Range Truck Group and Randy Marion Auto Group, providing sales and service coverage in key West Coast, Midwest, Pacific Northwest, New England, and Mid-Atlantic markets. Bollinger Motors, of Oak Park, Michigan, is an established EV truck company of Bollinger Innovations. Bollinger Motors has passed numerous milestones including its B4, Class 4 electric truck production launch on Sept. 16, 2024, and the development of a world-class dealer network with over 50 locations across the United States for sales and service support.
NOTE TO INVESTORS: The latest news and updates relating to BINI are available in the company's newsroom at

value.Title: United States Small Wind Turbine Market Size, Share & Analysis By 2034

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JJM-V2N3-RW3B-P16T-00000-00United States Small Wind Turbine Market Size, Share & Analysis By 20342026-05-12T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T15:38:45ZLexisNexisUnited States Small Wind Turbine Market Size, Share & Analysis By 2034

Market OverviewThe United States small wind turbine market size was valued at USD 33.05 million in 2026 and is projected to reach a value of USD 96.16 million by 2034, registering a CAGR of 12.6% during the forecast period (2026-2034).
The small wind turbine market in the United States is growing steadily, owing to rising demand for renewable energy. As of May 29, 2023, the American Wind Energy Association (AWEA) reported that the total installed wind power capacity in the United States was 97,963 megawatts (MW). The country has a total potential wind capacity of 10,640,080 megawatts.


Furthermore, small wind turbine retrofits, or the installation of new turbines on existing towers and foundations, accounted for 80% of small wind capacity additions in 2020. As the market matures and technology advances, small wind turbines are expected to play a more significant role in the country's energy transition, helping to build a more sustainable and resilient energy infrastructure.
Market SummaryMarket MetricDetails & Data (2025-2034)2025 Market Valuation USD 29.35 Million Estimated 2026 Value USD 33.05 Million Projected 2034 Value USD 96.16 Million CAGR (2026-2034) 12.6% Study Period 2022–2034Key Market PlayersEnvergate Energy AG, Kingspan Group, Kliux Energies, Superwind GmbH, Bergey Windpower Co.Download Free Sample Report to Get Detailed Insights.
Market DynamicsThe United States Small Wind Turbine Market Drivers:Supportive Government Policies and IncentivesSupportive government regulations and incentives are critical in boosting the adoption of tiny wind turbines in the United States. Federal tax credits, state-specific incentives, grants, and rebate programs make investing in small wind-generating installations financially appealing for individuals and businesses. The US federal government provides a 30% investment tax credit (ITC) for wind turbine projects that are more significant than one megawatt (MW). The Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) of August 2022 extended the ITC and PTC for wind projects until 2024. The IRA also provided additional tax breaks and enhanced credit amounts for projects that met specific criteria. In 2025, the PTC and ITC will be transformed into technology-neutral forms, which will be phased out in 2032.
Additionally, the California Public Utilities Commission's Self-Generation Incentive Program (SGIP) encourages installing dispersed energy resources such as wind turbines. The program offers incentives for qualified technologies placed on the customer side of the meter. California contains more than 11,000 wind turbines, with 4,029 at the Altamont Pass wind farm and 2,159 at the San Gorgonio Pass wind farm. The Altamont Pass wind farm is one of the world's largest, with 4,930 tiny wind turbines producing 576 megawatts of electricity.
The United States Small Wind Turbine Market Restraints:Inconsistency in Wind Pattern and Intermittent Nature of WindsSmall wind turbines may need more electricity to justify the expenditure in areas with unpredictable wind patterns. This is especially problematic for home users dependent on a consistent power source. According to the Center for Sustainable Systems, land-based wind turbines in the United States have an average capacity factor of 35%, ranging from 21 to 52%. However, research indicates that wind turbines only produce at or above their average rate around 40% of the time, implying that they generate little to no power 60% of the time. Wind speeds vary continually, limiting wind turbines to generate 25-30% of their maximum potential power output.
Furthermore, the capacity factor of a wind turbine is calculated as the average power production divided by the maximum power capability. Wind generators in the United States have an average capacity factor of 35%, lower than the 93% average capacity factor of nuclear generators. The Great Plains contains a broad belt of strong winds, with average yearly speeds of roughly 22 miles per hour (10 meters per second). The average wind speed in Fargo, North Dakota, is 12.3 miles per hour all year, day and night. Wind speeds are lower in July and August. However, summer thunderstorms can generate powerful wind gusts in localized locations. As a result, the intermittent and variable nature of wind resources poses considerable barriers to deploying tiny wind turbines in the United States.
The United States Small Wind Turbine Market Opportunity:Rural and Remote CommunitiesThe residential sector represents a significant market opportunity for small wind turbines as homeowners grow more interested in producing renewable energy and cutting their electricity bills. Wind is the fourth-largest source of electricity generation in the United States, making enough to power 46 million homes. Wind power is a renewable energy source that has the potential to reduce carbon dioxide emissions by 336 million metric tons per year in the United States. This is equivalent to the emissions from 73 million automobiles. Wind power is also the greatest form of renewable electricity generation in the United States, accounting for 10.1% of total electricity production. California is the third largest wind energy provider in the United States, and wind power is the state's principal renewable energy source.
Regional Analysis The United States small wind turbine market is expected to expand at a CAGR of 12.6% during the forecast period. The small wind turbine market in the United States is growing steadily, owing to rising demand for renewable energy. As of May 29, 2023, the American Wind Energy Association (AWEA) reported that the total installed wind power capacity in the United States was 97,963 megawatts (MW). The country has a total potential wind capacity of 10,640,080 megawatts.
Furthermore, small wind turbine retrofits, or the installation of new turbines on existing towers and foundations, accounted for 80% of small wind capacity additions in 2020. Due to favorable policies and abundant wind resources, Texas, California, Iowa, and Minnesota lead in small wind turbine installations. As the market matures and technology advances, small wind turbines are expected to play a more significant role in the country's energy transition, helping to build a more sustainable and resilient energy infrastructure.
Additionally, small wind turbines help to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by offering a cleaner alternative to fossil fuels. For example, a single small wind turbine with a capacity of 10 kW can offset around 12,000 pounds of CO2 per year. According to the United States Department of Energy, small wind turbines help avoid the emission of approximately 1 million metric tons of CO2 annually, contributing to national renewable energy and climate goals.
In addition, the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) 2022 established long-term incentives for distributed wind, which will be available for the next decade. The IRA extends the Residential Renewable Energy Tax Credit for small wind turbines through 2034. Since 2011, at least 23 small wind turbine models have been certified to the American Wind Energy Association (AWEA) 9.1-2009 or International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) 61400 standards. As of June 2023, only nine models have received current certification. Small wind turbine manufacturers must renew their certifications on an annual basis.
Segmental AnalysisThe United States Small Wind Turbine Market is Segmented Based on Axis Type, Grid Type, Component, Hybrid System, Power, and Application.The market is further segmented by axis type into Horizontal and vertical Axes.
Horizontal axis wind turbines dominate the market, valued at USD 20,459.9 thousand and rising at a CAGR of 13.0% over the projection period. The segment's expansion is attributed to its high efficiency, scalability, and proven performance. HAWTs are preferable because they can generate more power more efficiently, particularly in large areas with predictable wind patterns. They are also easy to scale, allowing larger installations with more power output.
Based on grid type, the market is fragmented into Off-Grid and On-Grid.
Off-grid small wind turbines have dominated the market based on grid type, with a market share of USD 16,894.8 thousand and a CAGR of 12.0% over the forecast period for various reasons. Their ability to provide power in remote and rural locations where grid connectivity is difficult or unavailable makes them valuable. They are most commonly seen in rural areas, farms, and off-grid homes, where energy independence is essential.
The market is sub-segmented based on components such as aerogenerators, solar photovoltaic panels, battery banks, charge controllers, and inverters.
Aerogenerators dominate the market, with a share of USD 10,191.9 thousand in 2023 and a CAGR of 12.6% throughout the forecast period. Aerogenerators are the system's most critical and valuable component since they capture and transform energy. Their efficiency in converting wind energy directly impacts the system's overall energy production. Given its relevance in energy generation, the aerogenerator has dominated the small wind turbine market. Its effectiveness, technological advancements, and direct impact on overall system performance make it the most significant component.
The market is divided by hybrid systems into Wind-Solar Photovoltaic (PV), Wind-Diesel, Wind-Fuel Cell, and Wind-Hydro.
Wind Solar PV dominates the market, with a share of USD 13,727.6 thousand in 2023 and a CAGR of 13.6% over the forecast period. Wind-solar PV hybrid systems combine wind turbines and solar panels to generate wind and solar energy. This combination takes advantage of the complementary nature of wind and solar power, with solar panels generating electricity during the day and wind turbines providing power at night and on cloudy days.
Based on power, the market is classified into Up to 5kW, 6kW-10kW, 11kW-20kW, and 21kW-50kW.
The most popular sector is up to 5kW, accounting for USD 12,900.5 thousand in 2023 and growing at a CAGR of 13.4% during the projection period. Small wind turbines with power ratings of up to 5 kW are widely used in residential and small-scale applications. Individual homes, cabins, and small farms can all profit from these turbines' energy output. They are trendy in rural and remote areas with limited or non-existent grid access.
The market can be bifurcated by application into Residential, Commercial, Agriculture, Industrial, Construction, Infrastructure, Telecommunication, Government & Military.
The agriculture industry emerges as the dominating segment, with a share of USD 8153.4 thousand and a 13.3% CAGR over the forecast period. The segment's growth is due to its unique energy requirements and the natural compatibility of wind power with agricultural operations. Agricultural activities are commonly carried out in rural or remote areas with limited or unstable grid access, making small wind turbines an appealing option for satisfying on-site energy demands.
